privileged_info_summary: The water leak forensics task uses SYNTHETIC data generated by the setup script. The 60-day meter dataset (3/1/2024-4/29/2024) shows normal baseline usage of 89.47 gal/day, with a leak starting on day 23 (3/23/2024, not day 22 as claimed). The leak rate is 305.6 gal/day, with 8,260.7 total gallons wasted and a calculated cost of $37.17 at $0.0045/gal. The claimed budget range of 6,000-8,000 gallons and $27-$36 cost are both slightly underestimated. A significant inconsistency exists: the scenario describes a $487 bill vs $160 normal, but the $0.0045/gal rate only accounts for ~$37 of waste, not the $327 difference claimed.
